page_content:
Prerequisite: JOUR361; and permission of JOUR-Philip Merrill College of Journalism.

JOUR358 Special Topics in Visual Communication (3 Credits) Advanced training and practice in visual communication. Prerequisite: JOUR320 or JOUR360.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

JOUR360 News Writing and Reporting II: Broadcast (3 Credits) Writing and reporting for broadcast media: production of news stories. Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in JOUR201.
